title: Things To Do in Boone NC This April Weekend
excerpt: Spring has arrived in the North Carolina High Country, and Boone is buzzing with outdoor adventures, local events, and the kind of weekend energy that makes first-time visitors start browsing real estate listings. Whether you're here to explore, relax, or seriously consider a move to the mountains, this April weekend guide has something for everyone.
image_alt: Downtown King Street in Boone NC on a sunny April weekend with people walking and blooming trees
